title: euphrasia alpina
intro: Euphrasia alpina, also known as Alpine Eyebright, is a flowering plant species native to mountainous regions in Europe. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphrasia alpina include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis, respiratory issues, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia alpina can be found in teas, tinctures, and eye drops, which are often used to treat eye infections and promote overall eye health.
